inputs.label: Initial Caffeine Dose
inputs.businessContext: Amount of caffeine consumed, e.g., an espresso shot ~63 mg, a cup of coffee ~95 mg, energy drink ~80 mg. Typical range: 50-500 mg.

inputs.label: Caffeine Half-Life
inputs.businessContext: Average half-life of caffeine in healthy adults: 3-7 hours, 5 hours typical. Smokers may have a half-life of 3 hours, pregnant women up to 15 hours.

inputs.label: Time Elapsed
inputs.businessContext: Hours since caffeine intake. For bedtime planning, consider elapsed time until sleep.

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body weight helps in assessing dose per kg, which relates to sensitivity. Average adult: 60-80 kg.
